series_metadata.series_description: Data tracking logs that are created for convenience to track status or functions of the section. The information contained in the logs is copied from official agency records. Logs maintained may include: Position Description Log, Job Posting Log, Supervisors’ LPC expiration dates tracking, Non- Rehabilitation Counselors’ CRC expiration tracking and Career Ladder Log.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Logs are constantly updated and information becomes superseded, replaced or obsolete. when no longer of administrative value
